ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the individual who posted the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical location associated with the tweet, if any */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Link to the tweet for easy access */,
  "imagelink" TEXT /* Link to any image associated with the tweet */,
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation this tweet is part of, if any */,
  "reply_to" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this is replying to, if any */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this is replying to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user this tweet is replying to */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether this tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweeted_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "profile_banner_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile banner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hashtag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* The ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the associated hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* The ID of the tweet where the mention occurs */,
  "mentioned_username" TEXT /* The username of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_index" INTEGER /* Index of the mention in the tweet text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the conversation */,
  "start_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that starts the conversation */,
  "end_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that ends the conversation */,
  "conversation_type" TEXT /* Type of conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_start_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code associated with the location */,
  "place_id" TEXT /* ID of the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_geo_locations" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* The ID of the tweet */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the tweet based on interactions */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score derived from the tweet text */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions of the tweet */,
  "url_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on any URLs in the tweet */,
  "hashtag_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on any hashtags in the tweet */,
  "username_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on any usernames in the tweet */,
  "media_views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the media in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the media */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet with which this media is associated */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the media */,
  "media_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media (for videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., retweet, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
